problem id: 33519c2f
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(6)

examples:
  11001101 -> 01100001
  11110100 -> 00100001
  00011101 -> 01000000
  11000111 -> 00110001
  01100111 -> 00011000
  00110010 -> 10000000
  01000111 -> 00010000
  01111000 -> 00000000
  11101000 -> 00000000
  00111111 -> 11001000

query: 11001010
predicted answer: 00010000
